narrative:
Prairie-J (precinct in Franklin County) has 588 registered voters, with 74.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.8 percentage points.
